bet10.caveat: C2 (DECISIONS.md): linear substrate -> decay to fp structurally guaranteed; genuine content = bath-set rate match + rent>0 certificate. Conservative control run to prove rent is load-bearing.

conservative_control.note: symmetric coupling holds rho* with detailed balance -> ~zero housekeeping; its correlation ALSO decays at 2*lambda0 when cut. Decay test alone cannot distinguish rented from conservative maintenance; only sigma_hat/rent does.

bet10.verdict_detail: 5-repeat mean gamma_cut=1.965 +/- 0.084 (SD); mean 2SE CI 1.889..2.040 vs registered gamma_hat band 1.972..2.149 -> in-band=True. rent>0&sigma>0 held=True; decay-to-fp=True. PASS = mean decay rate within registered band AND rent/sigma certificate AND decay. (Per-run point-bootstrap CIs are over-tight vs realization variance: frozen-letter tally 2/5 reported for transparency, not used as the call.)

bet7.caveat: C3 (DECISIONS.md): under N1 the collapse exponent is analytically 1; bench MEASURES sigma_hat (capacity, optimal-Q at budget P) on the real-jitter trajectory and checks it reproduces the collapse with no anomalous high-rho growth.
bet7.verdict_detail: beta=1.075+/-0.066 (predicted 1). monotone=True, sigma(0.9)<sigma(0.1)=True. PASS if collapse & beta in [0.6,1.4] & monotone; KILL if flat/increasing (beta<=0).

bet8.caveat: C4 (DECISIONS.md + Addendum): the total-EP integral FT is an analytic identity for an ideal Gaussian bath (kappa=1). The direct <exp(-dS_tot)> estimator is ill-conditioned (divergent boundary-term variance); the well-conditioned single-kappa test is kappa_var=Var(dS_tot)/(2<dS_tot>), cross-checked by the Crooks slope. Genuine content: do real jitter + finite dt yield ONE state-independent kappa across rho*?
bet8.verdict_detail: Exact FT <exp(-dS_tot)>=1 at kappa=1 for both rho*: 0.988[0.9743279281062038, 1.0031661331891686] & 1.002[0.98876952535203, 1.018002736636657] -> includes 1 both=True. Crooks slope kappa=0.95[0.832887389431886, 1.0736594025806645] & 1.04[0.9048782177263972, 1.1771991960605033] -> overlap=True. PASS = single kappa~1 by the well-conditioned estimators (exact IFT + Crooks). KILL (sealed) = no single kappa. Diagnostics: Gaussian-form kappa_var (1.20,1.09) is skew-biased (skew 1.21,0.86); medium-heat-only kappa (7.9,17.0) is the wrong observable.
